class.name: FestivalItem
class.brief_description: An inventory item that can be held or visibly presented.
class.description: Items are part of the perception equation both while simply held and when presented (visibly shown) to an NPC. Per-run inventory lives in [FestivalWorld]; this resource only describes the item.

members.member: The raw Secret Census source record, kept so no exported detail is lost.
Password phrase learned when the item is obtained; maps to a [FestivalKnowledge] entry (see [method FestivalCensusImporter.password_knowledge_id]).
If [code]true[/code], holding the item grants an extra power described by [member power_description].
Id of the NPC or [FestivalLocation] holding the item at the start of each run; see [member holder_type].
Where the item starts each run: [code]npc[/code] or [code]location[/code].
Unique identifier used by inventory and interaction gates.
If [code]true[/code], the item is part of the main progression path.
Id of the [FestivalPlotHook] storyline the item belongs to, or empty.
Free-form category of the extra power, for example [code]access[/code] or [code]social[/code].
Describes the extra power granted when [member grants_extra_power] is [code]true[/code].
If [code]true[/code], the item can be visibly presented to influence perception.
If [code]true[/code], multiple copies stack into a single inventory count.

Raw StageAvailability records, each a [Dictionary] with camelCase keys [code]gameState[/code], [code]locationType[/code], [code]locationId[/code] and [code]availableByNormalMeans[/code] (part of the Secret Census import contract).
